mapper.update: UPDATE users SET username = NULL, email = NULL, password = NULL WHERE `쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_settings (`쉼표번호`, notification_settings_json, theme, smartwatch_type) VALUES (#{쉼표번호}, #{notificationSettingsJson}, #{theme}, #{smartwatchType})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalLogs, COALESCE(SUM(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, start_time, end_time)), 0) AS totalMinutes FROM rest_logs WHERE `쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} AND deleted = 0
